prompt: Hook visual: Science has a clearer story about radio astronomy than social media does.
Context visual: Radio astronomy studies celestial objects through the radio waves they emit, revealing secrets light cannot.
Escalation visual: Imagine detecting a star's heartbeat from millions of light-years away, just by tuning into its radio signals.
Evidence visual: This technology has unlocked the mysteries of black holes, pulsars, and even the cosmic microwave background.
